# AI Content Engine

## Purpose
Turn founder ideas, transcripts, research, and proof into reusable content drafts across channels.

## KOI Brief

### Knowledge
- Brand voice
- Offer positioning
- Past posts
- Source transcripts
- Content calendar
- Proof library

### Output
- Hooks
- Posts
- Carousel outlines
- Reel scripts
- Newsletter draft
- Content calendar

### Instructions
- Start in draft-only mode.
- Use approved sources only.
- Log every output and escalation.
- Improve the Knowledge Loop when the human corrects an answer.

## Approval gates
- Publishing
- Claims/proof
- Pricing/promos
- Sensitive personal stories
- Brand-risk content

## Best first workflow
Build a weekly batch of 5 posts from one source transcript and queue for approval.

## 10-80-10 usage
First 10%: human defines outcome/source/boundaries. Middle 80%: AI drafts/summarizes/prepares options. Final 10%: human checks judgment and saves corrections.
